chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-160 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabole, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will avail remedy before the proper forum. Under instructions instant petitions is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
